elements.text: NC Office of Recovery and Resiliency (NCORR)

content.text: (“Agreement”) by and between Prexaco, LLC (the “Vendor”) and the State of North Carolina, Department of Public Safety, Office of Recovery and Resiliency (hereinafter referred to individually as “State” or “NCORR”) executed on March 15, 2023. Except as expressly provided in this Amendment, all terms and conditions of the original Agreement shall remain in force and shall apply to this Amendment. This Amendment, including all previous Amendments, Agreements, Invitation for Bid, Responses, and all of its exhibits constitutes the entire agreement between the parties. The Agreement is hereby amended as follows, to become effective upon signature of all parties.
This Amendment removes APP-06091, APP-05651, and APP-07816 due to the structur properties, these APPs are required to be converted to Reconstruction projects.
Contract Award replaced with the below table:

elements.caption: Replaced Contract Award Details
elements.summary: Table displaying project numbers, application IDs, addresses, cities, counties, and cost breakdown including materials multiplier and total award, noting items removed from the award.

To prevent delay in project completion, Vendor must execute/sign and return any amendment within
after issuance. Failure to do so may result in revocation or termination of the contract, in whole or in part, at the sole discretion of the State.

The undersigned individuals below represent and acknowledge they have the company power and authority to bind Prexaco, LLC the State of North Carolina Department of Public Safety to the terms of this Amendment.
North Carolina Department of Public Safety
